objective: Install a real LaunchRoom SaaS profile-distribution layer, not only create a blank Hermes profile.
discover: workspace path and project type choices
choices: skip toolset enabling and report partial
defer workspace setup and report partial
allowed_after_confirmation: generate simulated profile/workspace tree under -TestOutputRoot without calling hermes profile/config/tools
create target profile if missing
set source-backed non-secret Stage 1 Hermes config values
set terminal.cwd to the selected workspace
write profile SOUL.md from profile-distribution/launchroom-saas
write PROFILE_INSTRUCTIONS.md and LAUNCHROOM_PROFILE_CONTRACT.yaml
write .env.EXAMPLE with variable names only
write reports/profile-foundation-report.yaml
write reports/profile-apply-plan.yaml
write reports/stage-1-selected-settings.yaml
write reports/config.yaml.draft without applying unresolved placeholders live
write workspace README.md, AGENTS.md, and HERMES.md when compatibility templates exist
install bundled LaunchRoom starter skills into the target profile
enable selected starter toolsets where supported and report partial failures
write no-secret software inventory report
validate workspace path is not root, home, Hermes runtime, or credential directory
write workspace onboarding report
write workspace README.md, AGENTS.md, and HERMES.md
verify terminal.cwd equals selected workspace
safe top-level project structure scan without reading secrets
never: write unresolved __LAUNCHROOM_RESOLVE__ placeholders into live config.yaml
self-test mode must not call hermes profile create, hermes config set, or hermes tools enable
read .env, auth.json, state.db, OAuth stores, or .git internals during Stage 2 scan
run git add, commit, push, reset, clean, or rebase during Stage 2
mutate n8n, Cloudflare, Hetzner, MCP, gateway, provider, or production runtime during Stage 2
pass_requires: terminal.cwd equals selected workspace or is explicitly deferred
profile SOUL.md exists or is explicitly deferred
PROFILE_INSTRUCTIONS.md and LAUNCHROOM_PROFILE_CONTRACT.yaml exist or are explicitly deferred
reports/profile-foundation-report.yaml exists or is explicitly deferred
reports/stage-1-selected-settings.yaml exists or is explicitly deferred
workspace AGENTS.md and HERMES.md exist or are explicitly deferred
starter skills exist or are explicitly deferred
installer self-test creates simulated profile files under TestOutputRoot
workspace onboarding report exists and parses as YAML
workspace README.md, AGENTS.md, and HERMES.md exist
terminal.cwd equals selected workspace or is explicitly partial/deferred
Stage 2 safe scan excludes .env, auth.json, state.db, and .git internals
